title: cystopus flavus
intro: Cystopus flavus, also known as sea squirt, is a type of marine algae that belongs to the class Ascidiacea. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Cystopus flavus include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of certain cancers. Cystopus flavus is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal preparations such as infusions and decoctions.
